projectDescription: All-in-one hiring platform for creating career pages, posting jobs, and managing applicants with built-in ATS
keyFeatures: Beautiful Career Pages - Create branded, customizable career pages for your organization
Job Management - Post jobs with detailed descriptions, requirements, salary ranges, and custom questions
Applicant Tracking System - Track applicants through customizable pipeline stages with evaluations and scoring
Team Collaboration - Invite team members with role-based access to manage hiring together
Multi-Organization Support - Manage multiple organizations from a single account
Resume & File Storage - Integrated S3 storage for applicant resumes and documents
Activity Logging - Complete audit trail of all hiring activities and applicant movements
Custom Pipelines & Stages - Define custom hiring workflows for different job types
Evaluation & Scoring - Built-in scoring system for candidate evaluation by multiple interviewers
Email & Communication Tracking - Track all communications with applicants in one place
publicApiSurface: Organizations - Create, manage, and customize organization profiles with branded career pages
Jobs - Post and manage job listings with full details (type, location, salary, experience level, custom questions)
Applicants - Track candidates through application stages with status management (SUBMITTED, UNDERREVIEW, INTERVIEW, OFFER, REJECTED, HIRED)
Pipelines & Stages - Configure custom hiring workflows with multiple stages
Job Categories - Organize jobs into custom categories per organization
Team Members - Invite and manage team members with role-based permissions (owner, member)
Evaluations - Score and provide feedback on applicants at different stages
Activity Logs - View complete audit trail of actions and changes
Authentication - OAuth (Google) and email/password authentication via Better Auth
File Storage - Upload and manage applicant resumes via S3-compatible storage
